classes.reasoning: Document explicitly titled 'INFORMED CONSENT FORM' with signature blocks for participant and investigator, including consent statements to be initialed, and standard ICF sections covering study purpose, risks, benefits, voluntary participation, and withdrawal rights.

trial_title: A Phase II Study of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in Advanced Lung Cancer
indication: EGFR-mutant NSCLC that has progressed on osimertinib
summary: This is version 2.1 of the Informed Consent Form for a Phase II clinical trial testing BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in patients with advanced EGFR-mutant non-small cell lung cancer that has progressed on osimertinib. The document explains study procedures, risks including diarrhea and skin rash, potential benefits, participant rights to withdraw, and includes signature blocks for both participant and investigator consent.
